cards.title: Welcome to your Kanban board
cards.description: This is your board. Create cards, drag them between columns, and assign each to Me (Ch@o) or Claude. Cards assigned to Claude get picked up automatically and processed.

cards.title: Try assigning a card to Claude
cards.description: Make a card, set the assignee to Claude, and leave it in To Do. Within ~15 minutes the worker moves it to Doing, does the work, then Done with a link to the result.

cards.title: Example: draft a project status summary
cards.description: Write a one-paragraph status summary for a project called NEO-015 covering progress, risks and next steps. Use placeholder content where real data is unknown.
